docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF SHANE AUSTRIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAYMEL WHITE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 06/04/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2019 - JUDGMENT.
